programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) Abby assigns the girls a group dance about sorority hazing. One mother shockingly quits the team when Abby brings back former teammates Yolanda and Elliana to motivate the girls.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms: Episode
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) Abby challenges the ALDC team with their most daring routine yet in their first competition in Pittsburg. Longtime rivals Lilliana and Elliana go head-to-head in solos.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.
